docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $6,977.00 FILED BY LI, CHUN NGAI AS TO DEFENDANT KAYA, KENAN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-11-2025 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE: $75.00 SERVED JAN-14-2025, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT KAYA, KENAN

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-11-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-11-2025 BY JUDGE PRO TEM TOM COHEN. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF CHUN NGAI LI IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT KENAN KAY IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NOT REPORTED (D506)
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM FILED BY LI, CHUN NGAI
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-11-2025 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LI, CHUN NGAI RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KAYA, KENAN $6,977.00 PRINCIPAL, $150.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,127.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ORDER TO PRODUCE STATEMENT OF ASSETS AND TO APPEAR FOR EXAMINATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF LI, CHUN NGAI AS TO DEFENDANT KAYA, KENAN
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED AS TO DEFENDANT KAYA, KENAN HEARING SET FOR JUL-17-2025 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE WAS NOT LISTED SERVED JUN-16-2025, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT KAYA, KENAN
DECLARATION OF DEFENDANT'S NEW ADDRESS FILED BY PLAINTIFF LI, CHUN NGAI

SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF JUL-17-2025 IS CONTINUED TO AUG-28-2025 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506 BENCH LETTER ISSUED. BY VISITING JUDGE TAMILA IPEMA. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF CHUN NGAI LI IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT KENAN KAYA IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS REATINED. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
ORDER FOR CONTINUANCE RE: BENCH LETTER
NOTICE OF LIMITED SCOPE REPRESENTATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF LI, CHUN NGAI

BENCH LETTER ISSUED FOR AUG-28-2025; JUDGMENT DEBTOR KENAN KAYA FAILED TO APPEAR. WARRANT OF ATTACHMENT ORDERED ISSUED. BAIL SET AT 500.00.BY VISITING JUDGE CARRIE ZEPEDA. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF CHUN NGAI LI IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT KENAN KAYA IS NOT PRESENT. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
WARRANT OF ATTACHMENT ISSUED, BAIL SET AT $500.00, WARRANT FORWARDED TO DEPARTMENT 506 FOR REVIEW AND SIGNATURE. AS TO DEFENDANT KAYA, KENAN
